title: Generating a 2D Animation
scenario: Create a 2D animation of a complex scene with a set of 10 characters and a minimum of 20 animations per character. The animation should be optimized for performance and include specific visual effects such as particle systems and lighting.
constraints: Must include a minimum of 10 characters

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the generated animation is optimized for performance.
Check if the generated animation includes accurate particle systems and lighting effects.
Assess the overall quality of the generated animation.
